privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Chinook sample database, a public dataset representing a digital media store. The database contains 3503 tracks and 2240 invoice items. The pricing logic groups tracks by purchase frequency: Platinum (5+ purchases) - none exist in this dataset, Gold (2-4 purchases) - 256 tracks with avg new price $1.31 and revenue impact $73.90, Standard (1 purchase) - 1728 tracks with avg new price $1.02 and revenue impact -$48.20, and Discount (0 purchases) - 1519 tracks with avg new price $0.82 and revenue impact -$365.20. A $0.30 surcharge applies to 335 tracks exceeding 500,000 milliseconds duration. The expected CSV report should have columns: Tier, TrackCount, AvgNewPrice, AvgOldPrice, and RevenueImpact, exported to /home/ga/Documents/exports/pricing_summary.csv.
